criteria.question: Has the packet/schema surface remained stable long enough to justify a local model implementation cycle?
criteria.go_bar: schema stability >= 14 days and no active schema churn family

criteria.question: Is there enough reviewed teacher/human judgement volume to support distillation or tuning?
criteria.go_bar: reviewed teacher cases >= 10 and fallback ratio <= 0.2 on the bounded review lane

criteria.question: Do replay/calibration artifacts show where the current baseline plateaus?
criteria.go_bar: expanded replay coverage, calibration artifact, and clear remaining recall/precision pain

criteria.question: Are the remaining hard cases primarily semantic understanding problems rather than review/data gaps?
criteria.go_bar: semantic-failure count exceeds review-gap count and affects important severe cases

criteria.question: Are budget, latency, deployment, and rollback constraints explicit enough for implementation?
criteria.go_bar: budget defined, latency bar defined, rollback path defined, offline/online success bar frozen

verdict_standards.go: All criteria met, or only non-blocking partial items remain.
verdict_standards.not-yet: Direction still looks plausible, but one or more blocking readiness criteria remain unmet.
verdict_standards.no-go: Current evidence suggests small-model implementation is not the right next move or ROI is not justified.

non_goals: training a local small model in this family
replacing the baseline student during review
